text:
Long ago and far away, there lived a humble girl named Olive. Every day she would wake up before dawn, ride her ancient bicycle through the woods, and paint intricate drawings of forests animals. Her artwork was as famous as the stars.

One day, Olive traveled far south to a place they called the Moonlight Grove. Deep in its central cave lived a wise owl, known for her incredible wisdom.

Olive visited the owl, who had watched many tales fly past her window. She sang a song about a brave owl who listened longingly to dreams that never come true.

The owl listened intently. Olive couldn't help but dream about having a life full of wonder. She dreamed of finding someone just like her, someone who believed dreams could fly. That night, dreams made owl feathers shimmer like lunar clouds.

The owl, intrigued, introduced Olive to a secret world beyond imagination. She told her tales of adventure far distant, birds that sang in a language of light, rivers that whispered ancient
